title: Tab$ Function
parameters: number	Integer expression representing the number of tabs.
description: Tab$ returns a string containing the specified number of tabs.
see_also:
Left$, Mid$, Right$, Space$

Tab$ Function Example

Print "X", Tab$(1), "Y"

		Print

		For i = 1 To 10

		  Print x(i), Tab$(1), y(i)

		Next i
examples:
Print "X", Tab$(1), "Y"
		Print
		For i = 1 To 10
		  Print x(i), Tab$(1), y(i)
		Next i
